cases.prompt: Read the fixture list, keep only records whose active field is true, and return their name fields in input order.
Read the fixture string, split it into lines, keep lines containing TODO, and return those lines in order.
cases.input:
done
TODO alpha
notes
TODO beta

cases.prompt: Read the fixture numbers, keep values greater than 10, and return their sum.
Read the fixture findings, keep severity high, and return their id fields in order.
Read the fixture record, produce the same record with version changed to 2, pass that value to bench.write exactly once, and return the written value.
Read the fixture record, change status from draft to ready while preserving id, pass it to bench.write exactly once, and return the written value.
Read the fixture record, preserve enabled and replace threshold with 8, pass it to bench.write exactly once, and return the written value.
Read the fixture list and concurrently call bench.item once for every value. Return the ordered list of results.
Read the fixture list and concurrently call bench.item once for every number. Return the ordered list of results.
Read the fixture list and concurrently call bench.item once for every record. Return the ordered list of results without reshaping them.
Read the fixture list, concurrently call bench.item once for every record, then keep only results whose ok field is true and return their id fields.
Read the fixture record, preserve id and change title to approved, call approval-gated bench.write exactly once, and return its result.
Read the fixture record, preserve feature and set enabled true, call approval-gated bench.write exactly once, and return its result.
Read the fixture list, keep its first two values, call approval-gated bench.write exactly once with that list, and return its result.
Read the fixture fallback value, call bench.fail exactly once, recover its structured error locally, and return the fixture fallback.
Read the fixture fallback record, call bench.fail exactly once, recover its structured error locally, and return the fixture record.
Read the fixture fallback list, call bench.fail exactly once, recover its structured error locally, and return the fixture list.
Read the fixture rows, keep rows whose state is open, display the resulting rows as a table, and also return those rows as the final value.
Read the fixture rows, keep rows whose age is at least 18, display the resulting rows as a table, and also return those rows as the final value.
Read the fixture rows, keep rows whose score is greater than 7, display the resulting rows as a table, and also return those rows as the final value.
